title: user — outbound webhooks
description: Tenant admins can subscribe to user-lifecycle events via the webhook module (shared/webhooks, Wave 4). This blueprint declares the event types this module publishes. Payload shapes mirror the corresponding entries in `events.json` — the webhook module wraps them in the standard envelope.

event_types.description: New User created. Payload mirrors UserProvisioned event.
User soft-deleted (start of the erasure hold window). Does NOT fire on hard-delete — by then the caller's contract is void.
Profile mutated. Payload excludes the PII cluster — only `changed_fields` names are exposed to the webhook consumer.
Avatar changed. Payload includes new avatar_url + old avatar_url (pre-prune).

notes: Every payload is signed with the tenant's webhook secret (HMAC-SHA256) per the shared webhook contract.
Payloads NEVER include the full Profile PII cluster. Consumers who need to sync Profile data must re-fetch via the tenant-facing API on receipt of the webhook.
